blocks.text: `internal/hostintegration.ConsentLedger` and `ConsentRecord` model explicit user intent as append-only facts. The current allow/deny view is derived as `ConsentState`.

rows: Helper/login item/startup task may run after app close
A provider CLI may be executed
Detection may happen, execution is blocked
A selected workspace root may be accessed
SaaS progress/result metadata sync is allowed
Review/demo mode may run without provider installation
Only real provider status is shown

items: `provider-execute` requires a provider subject and must not include a workspace id.
`workspace-access` requires a workspace id subject and must not include a provider.
`background-helper`, `telemetry-sync`, and `review-demo-mode` are global consents and must not include provider or workspace subjects.
`revoked` is a new fact, not deletion. Only the reduced current view becomes false.
